title: Wire Authoring Skills to Call RecordConversation
summary: Design for wiring authoring skills to call the RecordConversation RPC via a shared conversation-recording reference and CLI invocation.
notes: Filed under docs/superpowers/specs with 'Status: Approved' (ADR-like) but content is a prescriptive technical/implementation contract (JSON schema, CLI invocation, file wiring) rather than a single architectural decision or user-facing requirements; classified SPEC over ADR/PRD.
